arts.ttl: Barca transfer news: La Masia graduate 'set' to commit long-term future to club
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly set to hand teenage midfielder Marc Bernal a new, long-term contract at the club, which will tie him down until 2029.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi and Sergio Aguero join padel! Esports team backed by Argentine legends follow Andy Murray, Robert Lewandowski and Rafael Nadal into Hexagon Cup
arts.sum: After the success of its first edition, the Hexagon Cup - a revolutionary padel tournament will return with a star-studded addition next year in Madrid.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star’s relationship with former boss Xavi ‘did not end well’
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking saw his relationship with former manager Xavi take a turn for the worse towards the end of last season. That’s according to Diario AS,…

arts.ttl: A Real Madrid fan was kicked out of the stands at Barcelona vs Getafe
arts.sum: A member of the fanbase at Real Madrid was forced into a premature departure from one of La Liga’s midweek fixtures. The matchup in question? Barcelona vs Getafe. Barca, of…

arts.ttl: EA FC 25 | La Liga’s biggest upgrades Ft. Lamine Yamal, Jude Bellingham and more…
arts.sum: EA’s latest football video game offering releases on September 27th, and with the highly anticipated release of FC 25 comes a whole host of new ratings for the players in…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star is the highest-rated defender in La Liga this season
arts.sum: A headline member of the defensive ranks at Barcelona stands out above all others as the highest-rated stopper in La Liga this season. That’s according to statisticians WhoScored, who point…

arts.ttl: Details: Wojciech Szczęsny’s Barcelona wage offer
arts.sum: An insight into the financial details of the agreement reached between La Liga giants Barcelona and Wojciech Szczęsny has on Thursday been provided. The name of shot-stopper Szczęsny has of…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'considering expensive' Marc-Andre ter Stegen replacement
arts.sum: Barcelona are reported to be monitoring Porto goalkeeper Diogo Costa in the event they opt to pursue a long-term replacement for Marc-Andre ter Stegen next summer. Targeting Costa next summer doesn't necessarily rule out a short-term option for interim cover until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Szczesny makes big demand after agreeing Barca move
arts.sum: Guillem Balague is reporting that Szczesny has already made a “bold demand” to Barcelona and has made it clear he will only return to football if he’s going to be first choice. Wojciech Szczesny has reportedly told Barcelona he wants to be the club’s No. 1 if he comes out of retirement to join the club.
